features.title: Track Rent Seamlessly
features.desc: Easily track rent payment status across multiple tenants in real time, completely eliminating the need for messy spreadsheets.

features.title: Prioritize Maintenance
features.desc: Stop disorganized text complaints. Tenants submit tickets so you can prioritize urgent vs. non-urgent issues and quickly dispatch contractors.

features.title: Centralize Contracts
features.desc: No more scattered physical files or lost emails. Store lease contracts securely in the cloud and never miss a renewal date again.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.desc: Set up your first property and invite tenants.

docs.title: Managing Leases
docs.desc: How to upload and track contract dates.

docs.title: Payment Tracking
docs.desc: Monitoring rent status across your portfolio.
